title: Ability to Sort Chart Axis by Row Order, Date Order, or Custom Order. Not just Alphabetical
excerpt: I have created a chart to graph number of registrations generated from marketing campaigns but I can only sort campaigns (X Axis) alphabetically. Unfortunately we don’t market campaigns alphabetically. I would like to so…

posts.author: edie7 (Edie Moore)
posts.cookedHtml: I have created a chart to graph number of registrations generated from marketing campaigns but I can only sort campaigns (X Axis) alphabetically. Unfortunately we don’t market campaigns alphabetically. I would like to sort them by the date they occurred, which is a column in the table but is not an option for sorting. I’m finding charts to be a bit difficult to work with due to this sorting issue. I have had to restructure some of my charts to compensate for this. Please add this option.

posts.author: peta (Peta Bolger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @edie7

You might benefit from using a pivot board - check it out!

Happy to connect and chat to help figure out best approach:
peta@upstreamtech.io

posts.author: edie7 (Edie Moore)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you Peta. Unfortunately Pivot Boards are only available on the Enterprise Plan. Appreciate the suggestion though.
